title: Flufflin The Shooting Star
description: Have you ever wondered what your true gifts might be - or how to find them? Flufflin and the Shooting Star is a tender, magical immersive tale that invites children and adults to drift into the world of dreams and self-discovery. Meet Flufflin, a quiet little creature who lives tucked away in a loft and holds a secret: he can see people’s dreams shimmering in the dark. Yet even with such a gift, Flufflin feels unsure of his own purpose. What is he meant to do? What hidden talents belong to him? One night, everything changes. A Shooting Star appears, offering three gentle steps to help him understand his path. But the journey that follows takes an unexpected turn - opening a space for audiences to reflect on their own special gifts and the meaning they bring to the world. A dreamy, poetic story that nurtures children’s confidence, self-belief, and the courage to follow their dreams.
